name: l5
description: Build and compile L5 projects using the Love2d game engine with a push of a button.

l5.path.description:
Path to your love executable. 

Windows: `C:\Program Files\LOVE\love.exe`. 

Linux: use 'love' if in PATH, or full path like /usr/bin/love. 

macOS: Move the Love application to your Applications folder and add /Applications/love.app/Contents/MacOS/love

l5.maxInstances.description: Set the max amount of instance you want to be able to spawn at the same time.

l5.useConsoleSubsystem.description: Should Löve be executed with the console subsystem? (Windows only)

l5.overwrite.description: Should the launcher overwrite the first process when launching another one?

l5.saveAllOnLaunch.description: Should VS Code save all opened files on Löve launch?

l5.autoRestartOnSave.description: Automatically restart LÖVE when a Lua file is saved

l5.customArgs.description: Additional command line arguments to pass to LÖVE (space-separated)
